title: Annual totals and their ranked contributors, 1990 · 2000 · 2013 · 2017
caption: Left: 1990 and 2000, totals 0.61% apart and ranked concentration profiles very similar. Right: 2013 and 2017, totals 1.6% apart, the widest concentration contrast among the thirteen pairs below the 3% threshold. Each bar is divided into its first, second and third contributor and all remaining positive units.
alt_text: Four stacked bars on a common absolute scale. 1990 and 2000 have nearly identical totals and are both led by Ethiopia at 52.1% and 51.1%. 2013 and 2017 have nearly identical totals, but Syria's leading share falls from 66.2% to 33.9%.
source: UCDP Organized Violence v26.1; ConflictLens calculations.
notes: Colour encodes rank, never country. Common absolute scale and zero baseline. White separators preserve grayscale reading.
background: transparent article canvas; preview composited on white
